shot_description: A broken version of Hulk wanders through the frozen remains of Earth after humanity abandoned the planet centuries ago. The skies are collapsing into cosmic fractures as time itself begins to decay. Buildings stand hollow and buried in ash and snow while distant sirens endlessly echo through the dead world. Hulk moves slowly through the empty streets, confused and emotionally exhausted, searching for signs of life that no longer exist. The atmosphere feels cold, hopeless, and surreal, like the universe is dying around him.
shot_prompt: A lone survivor stands frozen at the edge of a collapsing reality, staring into an endless white-blue void where time itself is unraveling. Massive ruined skyscrapers disappear into blinding snow and cosmic distortion. Emergency sirens echo faintly through the dead city. The atmosphere feels cold, empty, and apocalyptic. The character looks exhausted, confused, and emotionally shattered, witnessing the literal end of existence. Cinematic tracking shot from slightly behind the character, subtle handheld movement, ultra realistic lighting, volumetric fog, drifting ash and snow, faint blue light reflections, dark cinematic contrast, highly detailed textures, atmospheric depth, IMAX-style composition, end-of-time aesthetic, emotionally haunting, dystopian sci-fi realism.
